title: Deck 92
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Deck 92''' was the 92nd level of the [[DS-1 Orbital Battle Station/Legends|first Death Star]]. It contained storage areas and a recycling station at [[Sector N-One/Legends|Sector N-One]].

[[Celot Ratua Dil]] frequented this area when he first got on board the station.

It was destroyed along with the rest of the Death Star during the [[Battle of Yavin/Legends|Battle of Yavin]] in [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]].

==Appearances==
*[[Death Star (novel)|''Death Star'']] {{1st}}
